titles.en: Chapter 33 – Chewing gum for the Fasting one
Chapter 33 – Chewing gum for the Fasting one

segments: قُلْتُ الصَّائِمُ يَمْضَغُ الْعِلْكَ قَالَ لَا .
arabic.text: قُلْتُ الصَّائِمُ يَمْضَغُ الْعِلْكَ قَالَ لَا .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I said, ‘The Fasting-one, can he chew the gum?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I said, ‘The Fasting-one, can he chew the gum?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who chews chewing gum when fasting. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, he cannot do so.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who chews chewing gum when fasting. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, he cannot do so.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/296)
gradings.label: حسن
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/296)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنِ الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter 33 – Chewing gum for the Fasting one

segments: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَا مُحَمَّدُ إِيَّاكَ أَنْ تَمْضَغَ عِلْكاً فَإِنِّي مَضَغْتُ الْيَوْمَ عِلْكاً وَ أَنَا صَائِمٌ فَوَجَدْتُ فِي نَفْسِي مِنْهُ شَيْئاً .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَا مُحَمَّدُ إِيَّاكَ أَنْ تَمْضَغَ عِلْكاً فَإِنِّي مَضَغْتُ الْيَوْمَ عِلْكاً وَ أَنَا صَائِمٌ فَوَجَدْتُ فِي نَفْسِي مِنْهُ شَيْئاً .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
‘Abu Ja’farasws said: ‘O Muhammad! Beware of chewing Ilka (a type of gum) for Iasws chewed Ilka today and Iasws was Fasting, so Iasws found something from it in myselfasws’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said, ‘Abu Ja’farasws said: ‘O Muhammad! Beware of chewing Ilka (a type of gum) for Iasws chewed Ilka today and Iasws was Fasting, so Iasws found something from it in myselfasws’.

segments: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn, from Ali ibn al-Hakam from al-‘Ala’ ibn Razin from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once said to me, ‘O Muhammad, never chew chewing gum because I today did so when I was fasting and I found something from it in my soul.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn, from Ali ibn al-Hakam from al-‘Ala’ ibn Razin from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once said to me, ‘O Muhammad, never chew chewing gum because I today did so when I was fasting and I found something from it in my soul.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/296)
gradings.label: صحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/296)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنِ الْعَلَاءِ بْنِ رَزِينٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ
